finding: Error strings advertise removed flags --show-models and --list-projects; real commands are 'ocman models' / 'ocman list projects'
proposed_action: Rewrite the two error strings to name the real commands; grep for other stale refs

finding: main() top-level catch handles only KeyboardInterrupt + RecoveryError; other exceptions leak a raw traceback
proposed_action: Add a catch-all that prints a clean message by default and shows the traceback under -v

finding: Duration parse error omits accepted formats that --older-than help lists
proposed_action: Include accepted-format example in the surfaced DurationError

finding: 'Database not found at {path}' gives no next step
proposed_action: Add '--db PATH / run OpenCode first' hint

finding: Bare 'Invalid selection/choice' with no valid range
proposed_action: Add a valid-range hint at each site

finding: 'Session {id} not found' offers no 'list sessions' hint
reclaim absent from overview and all help TOPICs; only in help all / doctor
proposed_action: Add reclaim to the maintain help topic (+ optional overview pointer)

finding: Storage buttons 'Checkpoint + VACUUM' / 'Reclaim compacted parts' are jargon on the button face
proposed_action: Make the two button labels self-explaining

finding: Jargon verbs/flags (filter, rebase, -mi/-ml/-ic, .ocbox, subagent) not self-revealing by name
proposed_action: Rename only with deprecated aliases in a dedicated compat IPD
